known_gaps: Sentinel returned to ALERT/HIGH after the pilot, so no scaling is authorized.

The Orchestrator queue returned Unknown job type for section5_uncapped_index_snapshot; the final regression snapshot was run as a bounded read-only worker directly and should be registered before scaling.

The pilot proves additive alias creation plus service-context-safe verification for one title; it does not prove Plex has reindexed the new traditional alias as a separate traditional movie path because refresh/publication actions stayed blocked.
recommendation: Hold scaling while Sentinel is ALERT/HIGH. Fix/register the Orchestrator dispatch for section5_uncapped_index_snapshot, then run one quiet soak/recheck. If Sentinel is REVIEW/MEDIUM or PASS/LOW and the one-title alias remains stable, the next safe step is a 3-title additive pilot with the same verification model and rollback gate.
